name_en: New SERPENTI ELLIPSE series large shoulder bag
name_cn:
New SERPENTI ELLIPSE series large shoulder bag
Adding a touch of fashion to the SERPENTI FOREVER world with its unique shape, iconic details, and versatile charm.
This everyday bag is crafted from red calfskin, featuring city-grain calfskin in the center and smooth calfskin on the sides, accented with gold-plated brass. The enchanting classic snake head is centered with black scales and red enamel eyes, with the front magnetic closure hidden underneath.
It features a single compartment, an adjustable chain and leather shoulder strap, and a detachable leather handle, allowing it to be worn crossbody or as a classic shoulder bag. A practical top zipper with an internal pocket, and a back external pocket with a BVLGARI metal logo.
Model: 291636
Dimensions: 25.5×25×5.5 cm
